operating_ranges.evidence: The internal temperature of the device is measured in °C and given as INTERNAL_TEMP
In case values deviate more than 5 °C under the same profile circumstances, check voltages and thermocouples

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Check welding of TC tip with magnifier glass (should be shiny not dull)
In case values deviate more than 5 °C under the same profile circumstances, check voltages and thermocouples

fault_conditions.name: excess_temperature_alarm
fault_conditions.evidence: Excess Temperature alarm: Thermocouple break (one of the LED's will be lighted)

fault_conditions.name: thermocouple_break
fault_conditions.evidence: Temperature Controller alarm: Thermocouple break: Replace the thermocouple

fault_conditions.name: temperature_setpoint_not_reached
fault_conditions.description: Temperature does not reach programmed setpoint
fault_conditions.evidence: Temperature does'nt reach the setpoint: Wrong programming information in the digital temperature controller

fault_conditions.name: temperature_instability
fault_conditions.evidence: Temperature does'nt be stable: Wrong programming information in the digital temperature controller

maintenance_actions.name: daily_temperature_stability_check
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check temperature stability and temperature control of each stack during ramp up or down

maintenance_actions.name: monthly_excess_temperature_protection_check
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check if the excess temperature protection is still working (check setpoints for each zone)

maintenance_actions.name: monthly_furnace_profiling
maintenance_actions.evidence: Profile furnace minimal once a month. Record all spike values of new profile and compare with previous values

maintenance_actions.name: yearly_thermocouple_inspection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check TC's on performance. Check welding of TC tip with magnifier glass (should be shiny not dull)

maintenance_actions.name: yearly_dtc_calibration
maintenance_actions.evidence: After reassembling of all parts calibrate DTC according technical manual page 25 a/o. (chapter 4)

assumptions.statement: Temperature controllers use thermocouples as primary temperature sensors
assumptions.reason: Multiple references to thermocouple maintenance, calibration, and failure modes throughout the manual

assumptions.statement: Controllers have both primary temperature control and excess temperature protection functions
assumptions.reason: Manual distinguishes between Temperature Controller alarms and Excess Temperature alarms with separate maintenance procedures
